---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, script, template, or workflow improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who hits it? Include an example workflow that
is painful or impossible today.

## Proposed solution

Describe how the feature would work, from the user's (or agent's) point of
view. Be concrete — sketch the commands, skill triggers, or file layouts.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you didn't pick them.

## Scope safety check

- [ ] The proposal does not require committing real targets or personal data.
- [ ] Any hostnames/IPs in examples are placeholders (`example.com`, RFC1918).

## Notes

Links to related issues, skills, scripts, or external docs.
